concerns.text: InvariantsDataset entity fields (e.g. `total_count`, `hyperbolic_count`, `null_counts`) do not match contracts/dataset.schema.yaml (e.g. `total_records`, `hyperbolic_records`, `null_percentage_*`). Align field names and types between data-model.md and contracts/ to ensure schema validation tests pass.

RegressionModel entity fields (e.g. `vif_crossing`, `vif_braid`, `fitted_at`) do not fully match contracts/regression_model.schema.yaml (e.g. `vif_scores`, `model_id`, `predictors`, `residual_outliers`). Update data-model.md to reflect contract schema requirements.
